prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 3.2L Type 930/20 flat-six (from the 911 SC) with Mahle forged pistons (92mm bore), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft for high-RPM power delivery, paired with a 911 Carrera 3.2 intake manifold and Weber 48 IDA carburetors for optimized airflow and throttle response.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a G50/00 5-speed transmission (from the 964 Carrera) with a Guard Industries limited-slip differential (40% lockup) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) to handle increased torque, along with a custom 914-specific aluminum driveshaft from Elephant Racing to reduce rotational mass.

Suspension overhaul with Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height), Elephant Racing 22mm front and 20mm rear adjustable sway bars, and spherical bearing conversion for the front A-arms (using 911 SC ball joints) to eliminate compliance, paired with Tillet B12 lightweight racing seats and a 911 SC brake upgrade (304mm front rotors with 4-piston calipers, 299mm rear rotors with 2-piston calipers) for improved stopping power.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a 914-6 GT replica kit from Automobile Atlanta, featuring fiberglass fenders (flared 2.5 inches front, 3 inches rear), a carbon fiber front splitter from 914World, and a ducktail spoiler from Rennline, all finished in Porsche GT Silver Metallic (904) with period-correct Martini Racing stripes.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Alcantara headliner (from AutoKlassik), a MOMO Prototipo 330mm steering wheel (with a 911 SC horn button), and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay from 914Speedster, featuring VDO Classic gauges (180mph speedo, 8,000rpm tach) and a period-correct Blaupunkt Frankfurt radio.

Lightweight 15x8-inch front and 15x9-inch rear Fuchs-style wheels from ATS Classic (ET20 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50R15 front, 225/50R15 rear), paired with custom stainless steel braided brake lines from HEL Performance and gold-anodized caliper pistons for a subtle motorsport aesthetic.
